title: Submitting a Grievance, Complaint, or HR Concern
text:
Q: How do I submit a grievance, complaint, or HR concern?
A: To submit a grievance, complaint, or HR concern, please follow these steps: First, document your concern in writing, including specific details such as dates, times, and individuals involved. Next, submit your written grievance to your direct supervisor or the HR department within 10 business days of the incident. If your concern involves your supervisor, you may contact HR directly. HR will acknowledge receipt of your grievance within 5 business days and will initiate an investigation. You can expect a resolution or an update on the status of your grievance within 30 days. For further assistance, you may reach out to HR at hr@company.com or call the HR hotline at (123) 456-7890. Remember, all grievances will be handled confidentially and without retaliation.
